variables.name: VIKUNJA_POSTGRES_SERVER
variables.description: Server where the Vikunja PostgreSQL database is located.

variables.name: VIKUNJA_POSTGRES_USER
variables.description: User used to connect to the Vikunja PostgreSQL database.

variables.name: VIKUNJA_POSTGRES_PASSWORD
variables.description: Password used to connect to the Vikunja PostgreSQL database.

variables.name: VIKUNJA_POSTGRES_DATABASE
variables.description: Name of the Vikunja PostgreSQL database.

variables.name: VIKUNJA_JWT_SECRET
variables.description: Secret used by Vikunja to sign JWT tokens.

variables.name: VIKUNJA_OIDC_AUTH_URL
variables.description: Issuer URL of the Pocket ID instance used for OpenID Connect login.

variables.name: VIKUNJA_OIDC_CLIENT_ID
variables.description: Client ID of the Vikunja OIDC client in Pocket ID.

variables.name: VIKUNJA_OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET
variables.description: Client secret of the Vikunja OIDC client in Pocket ID.
